title: taraxacum albidum
intro: Taraxacum albidum, also known as white dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a type of herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum albidum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Taraxacum albidum is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a salve or cream to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
